name: Public Resources
description: Workflow templates for reviewing public resource portals, downloads, media, support, and event signup pages.
responsible_use: Use only public pages or pages where permission was granted.
Do not submit real personal data.
Stop before final submission/payment unless explicitly testing a local sample page.

workflows.name: Find resource
workflows.description: A visitor tries to search or navigate to a specific public resource.
workflows.execution_notes: Template only. Add browser_steps for a specific page before deterministic task execution.

workflows.name: Download resource
workflows.description: A visitor tries to download or open a public document or file.
workflows.execution_notes: Template only. Add browser_steps for a specific page before deterministic task execution.

workflows.name: Watch or read resource
workflows.description: A visitor tries to use a media or text resource and find accessible alternatives.
required_actions: Find captions, transcript, or readable alternative
workflows.execution_notes: Template only. Add browser_steps for a specific page before deterministic task execution.

workflows.name: Contact support
workflows.description: A visitor tries to find support information or complete a contact form.
required_actions: Complete permitted test fields if a form exists
workflows.execution_notes: Template only. Add browser_steps for a specific page before deterministic task execution.

workflows.name: Sign up for event
workflows.description: A visitor tries to find event information and reach a signup review step.
required_actions: Find date, time, and location details
workflows.execution_notes: Template only. Add browser_steps for a specific page before deterministic task execution.
